items.name: Desert Camo Coat
items.description:
🌵 Tactical Desert Camo Coat — Dominate the battlefield or rule the streets with this ultimate desert camouflage gear!
Featuring a realistic digital camo pattern, tactical pockets, and a utility belt, it’s perfect for military roleplay, survival games, or outdoor adventures in Roblox.

💡 Why You’ll Love It

High-quality 3D textures for maximum realism ✨

Multiple pockets for an authentic combat-ready look

Neutral desert tones that match any avatar

Ideal for FPS games, roleplay servers, or fashionable streetwear

🔍 Keywords: camo coat, desert camo, tactical coat, military jacket, army coat, survival outfit, combat gear, Roblox army, camo jacket, soldier outfit

Equip it and become the ruler of the desert 🔥💣

items.name: Lunella - The Bat Cinderella - Shoulder Pet Pal
items.description:
High above the Roblox skies, where the stars twinkle like diamonds, lives Lunella, the Bat Cinderella. Once an ordinary bat, she was enchanted by a moonbeam on a magical night, giving her shimmering wings and a heart full of dreams. Now, she soars through the night, spreading stardust and guiding lost travelers back home.

With every flap of her glowing wings, Lunella proves that even the smallest creatures can shine the brightest. 🌙✨

Color: blue / white
Position: right shoulder

Created by Dev_OnCake © 2025. Copyright protected. DMCA claims filed without warning upon infringement.

Tags:
plush, plushie, bat, toy, stuffed, plüsch ,plüschtier ,schwarz, UGC, pal, pet

items.name: Heart Eyes
items.description:
Add a touch of love and whimsy to your character with these heart-shaped eyes that pop out of your character’s head! This adorable accessory is perfect for expressing your affection and playful personality. Whether you’re celebrating a special occasion or just want to spread some joy, these heart eyes are sure to make a statement. Ideal for any outfit, this unique and eye-catching item is a must-have for any Roblox player.  Shop For More Here: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=11&Subcategory=19&CreatorName=BrickEffect&salesTypeFilter=1
